verification_notes: Builder output sandboxed in node: createBoard, applyMove (incl. all three illegal-move codes), checkOutcome on all 8 winning lines + draw + in_progress, legalMoves ascending order all confirmed. Input-immutability checked.

sub_goals.description: Implement pure rules-engine.js exposing createBoard, applyMove, checkOutcome, legalMoves matching both contract files. ES-module style with window-global fallback so a vanilla <script> tag works.
